summary: Anthropic's Claude Code containment engineering, Google ADK Go 2.0, Microsoft Copilot OS leak, and CVE-2026-59723 in Cline dominate. User workflow reports highlight bloat in Claude Code prompts and cross-agent transcript sharing. Infra primitives include agent-native search, memory MCP servers, and sandboxed execution.
